# services.tinyauth

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.tinyauth`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.tinyauth.dataDir` | `absolute path` | The directory where Tinyauth will store its data. |
| `services.tinyauth.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Tinyauth server. |
| `services.tinyauth.environmentFile` | `absolute path` | Path to an environment file loaded for Tinyauth. This can be used to securely store tokens and secrets outside of the world-readable Nix store. Example contents of the file: `TINYAUTH_AUTH_USERS=user-hash TINYAUTH_OAUTH_PROVIDERS_GOOGLE_CLIENTSECRET=client-secret` |
| `services.tinyauth.group` | `string` | Group account under which Tinyauth runs. |
| `services.tinyauth.package` | `package` | The tinyauth package to use. |
| `services.tinyauth.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (atom (null, bool, int, float or string))` | Environment variables that will be passed to Tinyauth. The "TINYAUTH\_" prefix will be prepended to the setting names. See [configuration options](https://tinyauth.app/docs/reference/configuration) for supported values. |
| `services.tinyauth.settings.ANALYTICS_ENABLED` | `boolean` | Whether to enable anonymous version collection. |
| `services.tinyauth.settings.APPURL` | `string` | URL of the app. |
| `services.tinyauth.settings.AUTH_LOGINMAXRETRIES` | `unsigned integer, meaning >=0` | Maximum login attempts before timeout (0 to disable). |
| `services.tinyauth.settings.AUTH_LOGINTIMEOUT` | `unsigned integer, meaning >=0` | Login timeout in seconds after max retries reached (0 to disable). |
| `services.tinyauth.settings.AUTH_TRUSTEDPROXIES` | `string` | Comma-separated list of trusted proxy addresses. |
| `services.tinyauth.settings.RESOURCES_ENABLED` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the resources server. |
| `services.tinyauth.settings.SERVER_ADDRESS` | `string` | Address to bind the server to. |
| `services.tinyauth.settings.SERVER_PORT` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port to run the server on. |
| `services.tinyauth.user` | `string` | User account under which Tinyauth runs. |
